examples: The hodgepodge system we have now demeans nearly all those who touch it.
"The Castle in the Forest" is a gleeful hodgepodge of ideas, held together by this Satanic conceit.
The hodgepodge system we have now demeans nearly all those who touch it. It is time to tear it down and start again.
The ski village, however, while a welcome hive of activity, has long been an architectural hodgepodge.
It was a sloppy user interface slapped on machines assembled by a hodgepodge of companies.
